Head.Title: Create
Head.Lead: Start by entering the basic information. You can define or add projects, skills and other content in the editor, and change them at any time.

step-one-box.title: Basic information
step-one-box.under-title: This information will be visible in your portfolio.
step-one-box.description-box: A brief description of your portfolio

step-two-box.title: Visibility & Language
step-two-box.under-title: Choose who can view your portfolio and the language in which it is displayed.

step-three-box.title: Select a template
step-three-box.under-title: Choose a template as a starting point. You can customise the design at any time.

cards.first-subtitle: Streamlined, with a focus on content
